seo.title: Kitesurfing School in Quebec City | Kite Aventure
seo.description: Kite Aventure is your kitesurfing school in Quebec City. Lessons for beginners and advanced riders, kite trips to top destinations. Book now!

home.heroSubtitle: Kite lessons for all levels and trips to the most beautiful kite destinations.
home.intro: Kite Aventure offers lessons for beginners, intermediate, and advanced riders, as well as kite travel / retreat packages to dream destinations where a wetsuit is not required! Need lessons, a refresher, or on-water supervision? Contact us.

certified.title: Certified Instructors
certified.description: Our team is made up of certified (IKO/FQK) and passionate instructors, ready to guide you through your progression.

equipment.title: Equipment Included
equipment.description: Equipment provided during our lessons: kite, harness, safety gear, etc. Wetsuit not included.

locations.title: Dream Spots
locations.description: Enjoy the best kite spots in Quebec and travel to paradise destinations.

home.ctaDescription: Book your first lesson or your next kitesurfing trip now.

seo.title: Our Team of Certified Instructors | Kite Aventure
seo.description: Meet our certified kitesurfing instructors in Quebec City. A passionate team ready to help you discover kitesurfing.

members.name: Simon L'Allier
members.bio: Certified instructor. Passionate about kitesurfing for over 20 years. He is the instructor you need to progress safely. Always ready to share his passion for kitesurfing and introduce riders to new spots.

members.name: Jean-Luc Robitaille
members.bio: Certified instructor. Big air enthusiast. Expert in warm and exotic destinations. Never wears a long wetsuit.

members.name: Benoit Fournier
members.bio: Kite veteran. North Kiteboarding representative. The best kite repair technician in eastern Canada.

seo.title: Kitesurfing Services — School and Trips | Kite Aventure
seo.description: Discover our kitesurfing lessons in Quebec City and our kite trips to the best destinations. Services for all levels.

schoolCard.title: Kitesurfing School
schoolCard.description: Learn kitesurfing with our certified instructors. Lessons for beginners, intermediate, and advanced riders in Quebec City.

tripsCard.title: Kitesurfing Trips
tripsCard.description: Travel to the best kite destinations. Professional guidance and unforgettable experiences.

seo.title: Kitesurfing Lessons in Quebec City — Beginner to Advanced | Kite Aventure
seo.description: Learn kitesurfing with our lessons for all levels in Quebec City. Certified instructors, equipment included. Book now!

school.title: Kitesurfing School
school.subtitle: Kite lessons for all levels in Quebec City
school.intro: Our kitesurfing school offers lessons for all levels. Whether you're a complete beginner or an advanced rider, our certified instructors will guide you through your progression.

beginner.title: Beginner
beginner.description: Kite discovery, kite piloting, body drag, and first waterstart. No experience required.

intermediate.title: Intermediate
intermediate.description: Waterstart improvement, independent riding, first upwind tacking.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.description: Advanced techniques, jumps, transitions, and freestyle. For independent riders.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.note: Contact us for current rates and group packages.

seo.title: Kitesurfing Trips — Dream Destinations | Kite Aventure
seo.description: Go on a kitesurfing trip with Kite Aventure. Sunny destinations, all-inclusive, professional guidance. Book your next kite trip!

trips.title: Kitesurfing Trips
trips.subtitle: Explore the best kite destinations in the world
trips.intro: Kite Aventure organizes kitesurfing trips to the most sought-after destinations worldwide. Enjoy professional guidance, ideal conditions, and unforgettable experiences.

items.name: Destination 1
items.description: Consistent winds, turquoise water, and white sand beaches. The ideal destination for kitesurfing.

items.name: Destination 2
items.description: World-renowned spot with perfect conditions for all levels.
